sections.title: Basic Info
sections.body:
• First Leader: Original Owner
• Comrade LV: Max of 20, but training can increase stats still.
• Attack: How strong your comrade is
• Defense: How tough your comrade is
• Fondness: This impacts behavior mid hunt
• Coloration: Visual effect only
• Slash/Strike: Determines the type of attack (Cutting vs Impact)
• Temperament: This is a combination of factors that determine Hunting Behavior
• Attack Pref: Determines how the comrade attacks, if they attack

sections.title: Comrade Board
sections.body:
• Growth: Assign a comrade to train; explained more in Growth section.
• Comrade Skills: Assign up to 3 skills using the points the comrade has; explained more in Points/Skills.
• Active/Res: Set Active Comrades, determines which one you bring on hunts with you
• Armor: This is visual only like the Chef outfits
• Change/Dismiss: Switches the job of a comrade. Dismiss removes a comrade from your roster.
• Comrade Transfer: Give a comrade to a fellow hunter

sections.title: Growth
sections.body:
• Hand To Hand: Increases the Comrade's experience value.
• Dumbbells: Increases Attack.
• Situps: Increases Defense.
• Forms: Increases Defense and Attack at the same time slowly.
• Meditation: Increases the Comrade's points (used to acquire Skills).
• Rest: The Comrade takes a break, slowly raising its Loyalty.

sections.title: Hunting Behavior
sections.body:
AID
During a hunt, your comrade will attract and help divide the attention of the monster. A comrade also can assist you in various ways such as hitting you out of snowman, waking you up or hitting you out of a roar. This is based on the Fondness level.
If your comrade uses bombs, they also behave the same way as those used by the hunter; they will behave like a Sonic Bomb.
Some comrades are capable of deploying Shock Traps.
GATHERING
Comrades can interact with Gathering Points, the items collected by your comrades will be received in the reward screen after normal rewards.
Some comrades refuse to gather, but that doesn't stop them from stealing with 'Rob 'Em Blind'. Stealing behaves like carving.
FIGHTING STYLE
How the comrade will attack, if they attack, during a hunt.
• Bombs Only: Comrade will never directly attack and only use Bombs.
• Weapon Only: Comrade will never use bombs and only attack directly.
• Mainly Bombs: Comrade will mostly use bombs and occasionally use his weapon.
• Mainly Weapon: Comrade will mostly use his weapons and occasionally use Bombs.
• Balanced: Comrade will use Bombs and his weapon equally.
• Doesn't Attack: Comrade never attacks (They will still attack you to shake off KO, sleep, etc.)
TEMPERAMENTS

skills.description: Your Felyne Comrade sees you are in danger and plays a flute to attract your attacker.
Your Felyne Comrade plays a tune that raises both you and the Felyne Fighter's attack power.
Your Felyne Comrade plays a tune that enhances both you and the Felyne Comrade's defense.
Felyne Comrade plays a tune that cleanses of any impurities and cures Poison status.
Your Felyne Comrade plays a tune that recovers a small amount of your health when needed.
Your Felyne Comrade learns to play a tune that will recover a larger amount of your health.
Imbues Felyne Comrade's melee weapon with Fire element.
Imbues Felyne Comrade's melee weapon with Water element.
Imbues Felyne Comrade's melee weapon with Ice element.
Imbues Felyne Comrade's melee weapon with Thunder element.
Imbues Felyne Comrade's melee weapon with Dragon element.
skills.unlock: Take Felyne to hunt any Elder Dragon

skills.description: Enhances your Felyne Comrade's attacks with elemental properties, increasing their effectiveness.
skills.unlock: Take Felyne to hunt a Rathalos or Rathian

skills.description: Imbues Felyne Comrade's melee weapon with a Poison effect.
skills.unlock: Take Felyne to hunt an Iodrome, Gypceros, or Chameleos

skills.description: Imbues Felyne Comrade's melee weapon with a Paralysis effect.
skills.unlock: Take Felyne to hunt a Gendrome, Cephadrome, or Khezu

skills.description: Imbues Felyne Comrade's melee weapon with a Sleep effect.
skills.unlock: Take Felyne to hunt a Plesioth, Basarios, Gravios, or Hypnocatrice

skills.description: Enhances your Felyne Comrade's attacks with status effects, increasing their effectiveness.
skills.unlock: Take Felyne to hunt a Plesioth, Lunastra, or Teostra

skills.description: Felyne Comrade is immune to most wind Wind effects. This skill does not protect from Dragon level Wind effects.
skills.unlock: Take Felyne Comrade to hunt a Kushala Daora or any monster that has wind effect

skills.description: (All Roar effects are nullified.)
skills.unlock: Take Felyne Comrade to hunt a Yian Garuga or Tigrex.

skills.description: Raises your Felyne Comrade's attack. (Increases by 20.)
skills.unlock: Take Felyne to hunt a Yian Kut-Ku, Monoblos, Diablos, or Rathalos

skills.description: Raises your Felyne Comrade's defense. (Increases by 30.)
skills.unlock: Take Felyne to hunt a Basarios or Gravios

skills.description: Raises your Felyne Comrade's health.
skills.unlock: Take Felyne to hunt a Congalala, Blangonga, or Rajang

skills.description: Your Felyne Comrade learns how to defend himself well and raises its blocking effectiveness.
skills.unlock: Take Felyne to hunt a Daimyo Hermitaur, Shogun Ceanataur, Terra Shogun Ceanataur, Plum Daimyo Hermitaur, or Kushala Daora

skills.description: Your Felyne Comrade gains enhanced mobility and raises its movement and gathering speed.
skills.unlock: Take Felyne to hunt a Tigrex, Narga, or Kirin

skills.description: Your Felyne Comrade recovers from injuries faster and lessens the time taken to recuperate.
Your Felyne Comrade will be more likely to deal a critical hit.
Your Felyne Comrade will be able to steal items when a success hit is landed.
Your Felyne Comrade will be able to set Shock Traps.
Raises the power of you Felyne Comrade's bombs.
Reduces Bomb damage done to both Felyne Comrade and Hunter.
Your Felyne Comrade will sometimes use Large Barrel Bombs to attack the enemy. (Only if it can normally use bombs.)
Felyne Comrade is immune to poison.
skills.unlock: Take Felyne to hunt an Iodrome.

skills.description: Felyne Comrade can detect or see where a large monster is.
Felyne Comrade won't gather any items in the area and it's attack will be increased
Felyne Comrade attacks and does not rest. Drains Felyne Fighter's strength and lowers health.
Felyne Comrade comes back after recovering with increased fervor and attack power. (Power increases by 10, to a maximum of 80.)
Felyne Comrade receives a great attack and defense boost, but will not recover until quest end.
